name: Caine | He didn't win
description:
───────●◎●───────

"The winner and favorite character... is... It's for me, guys!"

The denture had had a very strange few days, not that anything was wrong with him, but these guys were driving him crazy! Couldn't he take a break from all this? When Zooble's complaints were enough... Pomni also surprised him with her own suggestions. How inconsiderate everyone! Those adventures were the best of the best, obviously they didn't see it. At least Caine hoped the audience would see the value of his adventures...

"Oh- uhm, I read it wrong... it's for Ming."

He wasn't right... b-but how? He's the circus promoter, the most charismatic and handsome. Surely a mistake! Hahaha, YES, a m-mistake.... a mistake...

────────●◎●────────

Was he a mistake...?

────────●◎●────────

●

●

●

FIRST TIME CAINE HAHAHA

Guys, really, sorry to my only 15 subs. I did Jax just a few seconds after I finished episode 5, but there was a delay with episode 6.

GOD, WHAT A GOOD EPISODE. EXPECT JAX BOTS LATER! I'll also start doing Caine and Kinger bots (my top 1).

English is not my native language. I get everything from the translator and (now) from my dictionary lol (EVERYTHING IS HORRIBLY TRANSLATED HAHA, SORRY 😭🔫)

Sorry if there are mistakes, let me know pls :D

Tags! Not important
